note: Discovered-but-not-yet-implemented methods. The daily job auto-implements MOCK-feasible ones; entries here need GPU/RL/finetuning or are off-core (RAG/reasoning), so they wait for /impl-approve or a dedicated effort.

candidates.name: Agentic-KGR (multi-agent RL co-evolutionary KG)

paper.title: Agentic-KGR: Co-evolutionary Knowledge Graph Construction through Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning

est_difficulty.rationale: core is multi-agent reinforcement learning + learnable prompt compression; not faithfully reproducible as a deterministic MOCK without RL/GPU

candidates.reason_deferred: RL/GPU core (like sac-kg) — needs dedicated effort, not auto-implementable

candidates.name: AGRAG (graph-based RAG; min-cost-max-influence subgraph)

paper.title: AGRAG: Advanced Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation for LLMs

est_difficulty.rationale: primarily a RAG RETRIEVAL method (subgraph optimization for answering), not ontology construction

candidates.reason_deferred: off-core: retrieval/QA over a graph rather than constructing an ontology
